storyBeat: 國王愛新衣 — 騙子來城裡

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 emperor = 國王
🔑 clothes = 衣服
🔑 new = 新的
🔑 city = 城市
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago, there lived an emperor who loved new clothes.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前,有一位國王,他非常喜愛新衣服。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He had a clean coat for every hour of the day.
questions.question: How many coats did the emperor have?
questions.explanationZh: 一天每個小時都有一件新外套——這樣算下來,外套可多了。選「非常多件外套」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他一天每個鐘頭都有一件乾淨的外套可以換。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People said he cared more about his coats than his country.
questions.questionEn: Was the emperor a careful ruler of his country?
questions.explanationZh: 大家說他在乎外套勝過自己的國家——這樣還叫用心治國嗎?當然不算,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 大家都說，他關心外套的程度遠超過關心自己的國家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day, two strangers came to the city.
questions.explanationZh: 有一天,兩個陌生人來到城裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They walked straight to the palace gate with big smiles.
questions.question: Where did the two strangers go first?
questions.explanationZh: palace gate 就是皇宮的門——他們直接走去皇宮,選「皇宮」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們大步走到皇宮大門前，臉上掛著燦爛的笑容。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They told the guard they had something only an emperor could buy.
questions.explanationZh: 他們告訴守衛,他們有只有國王才買得起的東西。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The emperor heard this and sat up tall in his chair.
questions.question: How did the emperor feel about the strangers?
questions.explanationZh: sat up tall = 挺直身子坐好——這表示他聽進去了,選「準備聽他們講」。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝聽到這話，在椅子上挺直了腰。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He asked his men to bring the two strangers in at once.
questions.explanationZh: 他叫人立刻把兩個陌生人帶進來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the emperor feel about meeting the strangers?
questions.question: How did the emperor feel?
questions.explanationZh: 叫人立刻帶進來 → 好奇想知道。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝對見到那兩個陌生人有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two strangers smiled at each other as they walked in...
questions.explanationZh: 兩個陌生人邊走邊互相微笑……

storyBeat: 騙子說只有聰明人看得到 — 設下陷阱

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 weave = 織
🔑 cloth = 布
🔑 secret = 秘密
🔑 smart = 聰明
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two strangers said they could weave the finest cloth in the world.
questions.explanationZh: 兩個陌生人說,他們可以織出世上最好的布。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They held up their empty hands as if showing it.
questions.question: Did they really have any cloth to show?
questions.explanationZh: 他們舉起空空的手假裝展示——其實什麼都沒有,選「沒有,什麼都沒有」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們高舉著空空的雙手，好像真的在展示什麼似的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Their eyes moved quickly from face to face in the room.
questions.questionEn: Were the strangers watching how people reacted?
questions.explanationZh: 眼神快速掃過每一張臉——他們在偷偷觀察大家的反應,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們的眼睛在房間裡每個人臉上快速掃過去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This cloth has a secret rule," they said with a smile.
questions.explanationZh: 「這布有個秘密規則,」他們笑著說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Only smart and good people can see it."
questions.question: Who can see the cloth, according to the strangers?
questions.explanationZh: smart and good = 聰明又善良——按照他們的說法,只有這樣的人才看得見。
questions.sentenceZh: 「只有聰明善良的人才看得見它。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Anyone who is not smart enough will see only empty air."
questions.explanationZh: 「不夠聰明的人,只會看到空氣。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one would want to say that they could see nothing.
questions.question: Why was this rule clever for the strangers?
options: no one would dare say it was empty
all the children loved it the most
questions.explanationZh: 誰都不想被人家說「你看不見,你不夠聰明」——所以沒人敢說看不到,選那個答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 沒有人想承認自己什麼都看不見。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The emperor gave them gold and a big room to work in.
questions.explanationZh: 國王給了他們金子,還有一間大房間工作。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the two strangers really plan to do?
questions.question: What did they really plan?
questions.explanationZh: 空手 + 假規則 → 騙所有人。
questions.sentenceZh: 那兩個陌生人真正打算做什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next morning, the emperor sent his oldest minister to watch...
questions.explanationZh: 第二天早上,國王派出最老的大臣去看……

storyBeat: 大臣去看 — 他敢說沒看到嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 minister = 大臣
🔑 loom = 織布機
🔑 point = 指
🔑 afraid = 害怕
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old minister walked into the big work room.
questions.explanationZh: 老大臣走進大工作室。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two strangers pointed at empty looms with proud hands.
questions.question: What did the strangers show the minister?
options: looms with no cloth on them
a big basket of fresh bread
questions.explanationZh: empty looms = 空的織布機——他們指著空空的機器假裝展示。
questions.sentenceZh: 兩個陌生人神氣地指著空空的織布機。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old minister opened his eyes very wide.
questions.questionEn: Was the minister trying hard to see something?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛睜得大大的——他很努力想看到什麼,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 老大臣把眼睛睜得大大的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw nothing at all. The looms were empty.
questions.explanationZh: 他什麼都沒看到。織布機是空的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Am I not smart enough?" he thought to himself.
questions.question: What was the minister afraid people would think?
questions.explanationZh: 按照規則,看不到的就是「不夠聰明」——老大臣最怕被這樣說。選「被當作不夠聰明」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我是不是不夠聰明？」他在心裡想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But he was afraid to say so out loud.
questions.explanationZh: 但他不敢說出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Lovely! Truly lovely!" he said with a tight smile.
questions.question: What did the minister say about the cloth?
questions.explanationZh: 他說「Lovely! Truly lovely!」——意思是他稱讚布「好美」,但其實他說謊了。
questions.sentenceZh: 「好美啊！真的好美！」他硬擠出一個笑說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He went back to the emperor and praised the cloth with care.
questions.explanationZh: 他回去國王那裡,小心地稱讚那布。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the old minister really feel inside?
questions.question: How did he really feel?
questions.explanationZh: 怕被當不聰明 → 擔心自己 (lie 出於 fear)。
questions.sentenceZh: 老大臣心裡真正的感覺是什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The emperor heard the praise. He wanted to see for himself...
questions.explanationZh: 國王聽了讚美。他想親自去看……

storyBeat: 國王也去看 — 他敢說沒看到嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 see = 看見
🔑 nothing = 沒有
🔑 cold = 冷
🔑 soft = 軟
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last the emperor himself came to see the cloth.
questions.explanationZh: 最後,國王親自來看那布。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The strangers moved their hands fast over the empty looms.
questions.question: What were the strangers pretending to do?
questions.explanationZh: 他們的手在空的織布機上快速動——假裝在織布,選「織布」。
questions.sentenceZh: 兩個陌生人快速地在空織布機上比劃著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The emperor looked and looked. The looms stayed empty.
questions.questionEn: Could the emperor see any cloth?
questions.explanationZh: 國王看了又看,織布機還是空的——他根本看不見,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝看了又看，織布機始終是空的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His heart went cold inside his chest.
questions.explanationZh: 他胸口裡的心都涼了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Am I not smart enough?" he thought to himself.
questions.question: What did the emperor secretly fear?
questions.explanationZh: 他心想「難道我不夠聰明?」——他最怕被當成不聰明的人。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我是不是不夠聰明？」他在心裡想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He smiled and turned to his men around him.
questions.explanationZh: 他笑著轉向身邊的人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Oh, what fine colors! What soft cloth!" he said.
questions.question: What did the emperor say about the cloth?
questions.explanationZh: 他說「好美的顏色!」——他稱讚顏色,選「他喜歡漂亮顏色」,雖然他在說謊。
questions.sentenceZh: 「哦，多漂亮的顏色！多柔軟的布料！」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All his men nodded fast. They all said it was lovely.
questions.explanationZh: 所有的人都快速點頭。他們都說很美。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the men around the emperor do?
questions.question: What did the men do?
questions.explanationZh: 所有人點頭說美 → 也跟著說謊 (cascade)。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝身邊的人做了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A big parade was planned for the very next day...
questions.explanationZh: 隔天就要舉辦盛大遊行……

storyBeat: 遊行開始 — 人民會說真話嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 ready = 準備好
🔑 parade = 遊行
🔑 step = 踏出
🔑 clap = 拍手
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The strangers said the new clothes were ready for the parade.
questions.explanationZh: 陌生人說新衣服已經準備好,可以遊行了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They mimed putting the coat on the emperor with care.
questions.question: What were the strangers really putting on him?
questions.explanationZh: mimed = 假裝動作——他們假裝幫國王穿衣服,其實根本什麼都沒穿,選「完全沒衣服」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們小心翼翼地比劃著，假裝把外套穿到皇帝身上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The emperor turned in front of the mirror with a stiff smile.
questions.questionEn: Did the emperor feel comfortable about this?
questions.explanationZh: 僵硬的笑容——笑得很不自然,表示他不舒服,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝在鏡子前轉了一圈，臉上掛著僵硬的笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The emperor stepped out wearing nothing at all.
questions.explanationZh: 國王踏出去,身上什麼都沒穿。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked tall under a soft cover held up by four men.
questions.question: How was the emperor walking in the parade?
options: showing himself for all to see
sitting in a fast horse coach
questions.explanationZh: walked tall = 高高走著,還有四個人打著傘蓋——他讓全城的人都看見自己,選「讓所有人看見自己」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他昂首挺胸，走在四個人高舉的軟頂蓬下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All the people of the city came out to watch.
questions.explanationZh: 全城的人都出來看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They all clapped and called out about the new coat.
questions.question: What did the crowd do during the parade?
questions.explanationZh: 大家拍手、呼喊,稱讚那件根本不存在的衣服——選「稱讚不存在的衣服」。
questions.sentenceZh: 大家都拍手叫好，稱讚那件新外套。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one wanted to be the first to say something else.
questions.explanationZh: 沒有人想第一個說別的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Why did the people not speak the truth?
questions.question: Why did they stay quiet?
questions.explanationZh: 沒人想第一個說真話——因為大家都怕被當成笨蛋,選「怕被當笨蛋」。
questions.sentenceZh: 為什麼人們不說真話？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And at the front of the street, one small child was watching too...
questions.explanationZh: 街道前方,有一個小孩也在看……

storyBeat: 小孩說真話 — 大家會怎樣?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 child = 小孩
🔑 front = 前面
🔑 clear = 清楚
🔑 quiet = 安靜
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A small child stood at the front of the street.
questions.explanationZh: 一個小孩站在街道前方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked up at the emperor with big honest eyes.
questions.question: How did the child see the emperor?
questions.explanationZh: big honest eyes = 誠實的大眼睛——他用最真實的眼光看國王,選「就是他真正的樣子」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他抬頭望著皇帝，眼神又大又誠實。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The child had never heard about the secret rule.
questions.questionEn: Did the child feel any pressure to lie?
questions.explanationZh: 他根本沒聽過那個規則——沒有規則的壓力,他當然不需要說謊,答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 這個孩子從來沒聽說過那條秘密規定。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not understand why people were clapping so loud.
questions.explanationZh: 他不懂為什麼大家拍手拍得這麼大聲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: To him, the emperor looked just like any man in a bath.
questions.question: How did the emperor look to the child?
options: like a hero from a story
with no clothes on at all
questions.explanationZh: 在小孩眼裡,國王就像剛洗完澡的人——完全沒穿衣服嘛,選「完全沒穿衣服」。
questions.sentenceZh: 在他眼裡，皇帝就跟泡澡的普通人沒什麼兩樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "But he has no clothes on!" the child said in a clear voice.
questions.explanationZh: 「可是他沒穿衣服!」小孩用清亮的聲音說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His small voice cut through the noise of the parade.
questions.question: How did the child say the truth?
questions.explanationZh: cut through noise = 聲音穿透嘈雜——小孩的聲音清清楚楚傳出去,選「大聲又清楚」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他細小的聲音穿過遊行的喧鬧，傳進每個人耳裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The street went quiet. No one clapped now.
questions.explanationZh: 街道安靜下來。沒有人拍手了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the people feel after the child spoke?
questions.question: How did they feel?
questions.explanationZh: 街道安靜 → 大家驚訝安靜 (spell broken)。
questions.sentenceZh: 孩子說完那句話之後，人們是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then everyone began to whisper. Soon the whisper became a wave...
questions.explanationZh: 然後大家開始低聲說話。耳語很快變成一陣浪潮……

storyBeat: 國王繼續走完遊行 — 學到什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 hear = 聽
🔑 truth = 真相
🔑 head = 頭
🔑 walk = 走
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The emperor heard the child. His face turned red.
questions.explanationZh: 國王聽見小孩的話。他的臉變紅了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A hot feeling rose from his chest to his cheeks.
questions.question: How did the emperor feel inside?
questions.explanationZh: 胸口有股熱熱的感覺衝到臉頰——那是羞愧呀,選「羞愧又熱」。
questions.sentenceZh: 一股燙熱的感覺從胸口一路湧上臉頰。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In one quick moment, he understood the whole trick.
questions.questionEn: Did the emperor now know that he had been tricked?
questions.explanationZh: 一瞬間就懂了整個騙局——他知道自己被騙了,答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 就在那一瞬間，他明白了整個把戲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He knew the truth now. Everyone around him knew too.
questions.explanationZh: 現在他知道真相了。身邊每個人也都知道。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could have run home and shut the door behind him.
questions.question: What was one choice the emperor could have made?
questions.explanationZh: run home + shut door = 跑回家、把門關上——就是回家躲起來,選「回家躲起來」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他本來可以跑回家，把門關上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But he held his head high and did not stop.
questions.explanationZh: 但他抬頭挺胸,沒有停下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He kept walking with the slow steps of a king.
questions.question: What did the emperor choose to do?
questions.explanationZh: kept walking = 繼續走——他沒有停,而是走完整個遊行,選「走完遊行」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他繼續向前走，邁著國王才有的從容步伐。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He walked all the way to the end of the parade.
questions.explanationZh: 他一路走到遊行的盡頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was harder for the emperor to put down?
questions.question: What was hardest to put down?
questions.explanationZh: 知道真相還繼續走 → 自尊比真相更難放下。
questions.sentenceZh: 皇帝最難放下的是什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And the people watched him go, all the way to the palace gate...
questions.explanationZh: 人們看著他走,一路走到皇宮大門……
